name: taskgoblin-project-manager
description: Native Codex mirror of the TaskGoblin PM and Jira operator pack

interface.shortDescription: Operator-side planning, Jira, sprint, and roadmap workflows
interface.longDescription: Native Codex packaging for the TaskGoblin operator-side PM pack. Mirrors the repo-local `.claude/agents` source pack, adds native skill discovery, and ships safe connector scaffolding for Jira with Slack left as placeholder-only configuration.
defaultPrompt: Plan a TaskGoblin change and prepare a Jira dry-run
Break down this TaskGoblin feature into sprint-ready work
Build a roadmap for TaskGoblin verification and MCP work
